(Updated: 03 February 2019)
Really excited to share this technique that no one else in the world (at the time of writing this)
is doing.
Automated testing using automation. This will literally save you hours in the day (especially as
your testing increases) and make you more revenue and higher profits.
The concept is simple:
- Run Graduation Testing
- Automated Rules Decide the Winners from Losers
- You Move Them to a Scale Campaign to test Scaling!
The future is AI (Artificial Intelligence) and ML (Machine Learning) but we're not there yet.
So in the meantime watch the videos below and implement to speed up testing and scaling!
